frontend-agent.description: Build Next.js frontend code for the BMS Dashboard — dashboard builder with drag-and-drop, card types, charts, floor plan SVG, and filters.

backend-agent.description: Build backend API for the BMS Dashboard — Prisma queries, aggregation logic, dynamic query construction, and filtering.

infra-agent.description: Set up database infrastructure — Prisma schema, SQL Server connection, CSV data seeding.

bug-hunter-agent.description: Find and fix bugs in the BMS Dashboard — investigate test failures, rendering issues, filter problems, and edge cases.

code-review-agent.description: Review code quality — component structure, naming, dead code, TypeScript usage, and pattern consistency.

security-auditor-agent.description: Perform security audits — SQL injection, XSS, insecure endpoints, data exposure, Prisma query safety.

ui-ux-agent.description: Polish visual design — Tailwind CSS styling, color scheme, responsive layout, loading/empty states.

testing-agent.description: Write and run tests — unit tests, integration tests, and component tests.

document-writer-agent.description: Create project documentation — README, Architecture Brief, PROMPT_HISTORY.md.

orchestrator-agent.description: Orchestrate BMS Dashboard builds by delegating work to specialist agents.
